501.name: Red Potion
501.description: A potion that restores 45 HP. Essential for any adventurer.

512.name: Apple
512.description: A juicy apple that restores 30 HP when consumed.

513.name: Orange
513.description: A fresh orange that restores 30 HP and 10 SP.

909.name: Jellopy
909.description: A sticky substance dropped by Porings. Used in various crafting recipes.

1010.name: Phracon
1010.description: An impure substance used to upgrade weapons. Used as upgrade material for level 1 weapons.

1101.name: Sword
1101.description: A basic one-handed sword. ATK: 35. Weapon Level 1.

1103.name: Falchion
1103.description: A curved one-handed sword. ATK: 44. Weapon Level 1.

1119.name: Katana
1119.description: A long Japanese-style sword. ATK: 75. Weapon Level 2. Can be equipped by Swordman and Merchant.

1155.name: Zweihander
1155.description: A massive two-handed sword. ATK: 160. Weapon Level 3. Requires STR 80.

1229.name: Main Gauche
1229.description: A parrying dagger with a broad guard. ATK: 53. Weapon Level 2. Enables 4 card slots.

2202.name: Stiletto
2202.description: A thin sword designed for thrusting. ATK: 55. Weapon Level 2.

2301.name: Cotton Shirt
2301.description: A basic shirt made of cotton. DEF: 3.

2303.name: Coat
2303.description: A sturdy coat. DEF: 9. Can be worn by most classes.

2320.name: Chain Mail
2320.description: Armor made of interlocking metal rings. DEF: 25. Swordman class only.

2357.name: Plate Armor
2357.description: Heavy full-body armor. DEF: 60. Knight and Crusader only. Requires VIT 30.

2399.name: Valkyrian Armor
2399.description: Armor blessed by the Valkyries. DEF: 65. Indestructible. All classes. Adds resistance to Silence.

7166.name: Old Blue Box
7166.description: A blue box containing random items. Open it to receive a random prize.

obtainFrom.description: Reward from collecting gifts in Alberta during Christmas event

102947.name: Antiquity of Ghost Ship (Ghost Ship Captain)
